name: Tinymight 2 - Dosing Capsule V2
summary: Experience the ease of using pre-loaded botanical capsules for Tinymight 2.
description: Experience the ease of using pre-loaded botanical capsules for Tinymight 2. The Dosing Capsules V2 help maintain a cleaner vaporiser with less maintenance. These efficient capsules allow for easy organisation and quick preparation for a second session, saving time and hassle. To clean, soak the capsules in isopropyl alcohol and rinse with warm water. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
